overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rainy medieval village at night, passing an NPC at a cooking fire, then transitioning into a dark forest path. The atmosphere is moody with heavy rain, firelight, and limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: village courtyard with central cooking fire

events.description: character approaches and pauses briefly near the cooking pot

agents.ego_description: walking through the village courtyard toward a cooking fire where an NPC is working

notable_agents.action: tending to a large cooking pot over a fire, stirring contents

entered.detail: large black cauldron emitting steam over a campfire
traditional wooden village building with thatched roof
simple wooden post fence lining the courtyard
wooden structure with lit windows in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open village courtyard in heavy rain, approaching a cooking fire where an NPC tends a steaming pot. Wooden huts and fences frame the muddy square, with warm firelight contrasting against the dark rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: village pathway with wooden scaffolding and stairs

events.description: moves from open courtyard into narrower pathway between wooden buildings
passes a campfire on the left, creating flickering orange light on surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow village pathways between wooden structures and scaffolding

entered.detail: rough timber scaffolding structure against a building
steep wooden staircase leading to an upper level
low stone wall lining the path edge

segments.scene_description: Leaving the central courtyard, the character enters a narrow village passage lined with wooden scaffolding and stairs. A campfire burns on the left, casting dancing shadows on the wet ground as the path leads toward the village edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with tall pine trees

events.description: exits the village completely and enters the dense forest
forest becomes noticeably darker as the tree canopy thickens overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path through the dense forest

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming a dense canopy overhead
narrow winding dirt trail through the woods
large fallen tree trunk lying beside the path
distant mountain peaks visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the village behind and enters a dense forest, walking along a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall pine trees. The environment becomes progressively darker as the canopy thickens, with rain filtering through the branches and distant mountains barely visible through the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched medieval village courtyard into the oppressive darkness of a dense forest. It begins in a muddy square where the character approaches a steaming cooking fire, with warm light contrasting against the heavy rain and surrounding wooden huts. As the character moves away from the central fire, the scene shifts into a narrow village passage lined with wooden scaffolding and flickering campfires that cast dancing shadows across the wet ground. The path then leads out of the settlement and into a thicket of tall pine trees, where the environment becomes progressively darker as the canopy closes overhead. Finally, the camera follows the character along a narrow dirt path through the mist, with distant mountains barely visible through the filtering rain.
